properties.label: HS1 18:25Z
properties.name: Handshake 1 · 18:25 log-on ring
properties.desc: The SATCOM terminal logged back on at 18:25:27 UTC, three minutes after the last radar fix. First of the seven timing rings.

properties.label: HS2 19:41Z
properties.name: Handshake 2 · 19:41 ring
properties.desc: Hourly ground-station interrogation. The smallest of the seven rings: the aircraft was closest to the satellite around this time.

properties.label: HS7 00:19Z
properties.name: 7th arc · 00:19 final log-on
properties.desc: The final, incomplete log-on at 00:19:29 UTC, consistent with restart after fuel exhaustion. Every underwater search has followed this ring.
